title: CeBIH Conference 2024: Stakeholders Gather to Shape Nigeria’s Payment System Vision 2030 - FinancialEDGE
description: The Committee of e-Business Industry Heads (CeBIH) Conference 2024 recently took place in Lagos, bringing together key stakeholders to discuss Nigeria's Payment System Vision 2030. The conference, themed "Payment System Vision 2030: Navigating Contemporary Issues," aimed to provide insights, partnerships, and momentum needed to achieve the ambitious goals of PSV 2030.
html: The Committee of e-Business Industry Heads (CeBIH) Conference 2024 recently took place in Lagos, bringing together key stakeholders to discuss Nigeria’s Payment System Vision 2030. The conference, themed “Payment System Vision 2030: Navigating Contemporary Issues,” aimed to provide insights, partnerships, and momentum needed to achieve the ambitious goals of PSV 2030.
